name: jansamadhan-grievance-redressal-system
description: This project classifies citizen grievances into predefined categories using Logistic Regression, Naïve Bayes, and NLTK for text processing. The system also determines whether a grievance is **Critical** or **Non-Critical**. The frontend is built with React, and the backend uses Node.js, Express, and MongoDB (**MERN Stack**).
